slides.title: The overall vision and strategy for the project
prompts: What are we trying to accomplish?
slides.visionText: Create a focused growth model that aligns customer choices, proposition design, and delivery investment behind one clear ambition.
bandHeadings: Customer segmentation and value chain prioritization
bandBodies: Define where to play first by identifying the customer groups, needs, and value pools that matter most.
Clarify the offer, differentiators, and solution themes that will make the strategy tangible in market.
Translate the strategy into channels, coverage, capabilities, and governance that can deliver it consistently.
